title: Read the Request Body
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This POST handler should greet whoever was submitted in the JSON body, but it ignores the request entirely and hardcodes a name.

Read the `username` field from `req.body` and use it in the response. The `express.json()` middleware has already populated `req.body`.
objectives: Use that value in the JSON response
hints: With `express.json()` enabled, the parsed JSON payload is on `req.body`.
